stanzas:
Kodi Vettu Pottu Song Lyrics
Singer : Shankar Mahadevan
Music : Santhosh Narayanan
Lyrics : Vivek

patti thotti
chella magan
enga veettu
pulla ivan
etti paakkuraan
uchchi thottu
thaakkuraan

venaandaa akkaaporu
nee thalli nikka paaru
mudinja kaivachchi paaru

ivan pona pakkam paaru
ullooru thaandi kooda
ivan peru nikkum paaruda

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Vettu Pottu'?

'Vettu Pottu' is an energetic song that celebrates victory and confidence, reflecting the protagonist's triumphs in the movie.

What is the context of this song in the movie Kodi?

The song plays during a pivotal moment in Kodi, highlighting the protagonist's determination and zest for life.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Shankar Mahadevan and composed by Santhosh Narayanan.

When was 'Vettu Pottu' released?

'Vettu Pottu' was released on October 6, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Vettu Pottu', the vibrant energy of the song mirrors the protagonist's spirited journey in the movie Kodi. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of joy and celebration, making it an anthem for triumph. Shankar Mahadevan's powerful vocals combined with Santhosh Narayanan's lively composition create an exhilarating experience. This song is perfect for parties and celebrations, encapsulating the essence of victory and enthusiasm.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vettu Pottu from Kodi is an electrifying anthem that showcases Shankar Mahadevan's powerful vocals paired with Santhosh Narayanan's dynamic composition. This song perfectly captures the spirit of celebration and energy, making it a must-listen for any party playlist. Dive into the vibrant beats and catchy lyrics that will have you dancing in no time!
stanzaMeanings: He is celebrating after winning, and we are with him, whistling along.
The game has started, and he is in your place, taking charge.
He is the son of our house, looking at the girl and making a move.
He is coming with a vehicle, ready to take you away, talking sweetly.
If you touch it, it will fly in all directions, and the flag will soar high.
He is celebrating after winning, and we are with him, whistling along.
The game has started, and he is in your place, taking charge.
The way he came will not be forgotten; he is a clever boy.
There is no deceit in his heart; he will finish things properly without any tricks.
You should see how he handles things; look at the finished product.
Look at where he has gone; even crossing the village, his name will be known.
If you touch it, it will fly in all directions, and the flag will soar high.
He is celebrating after winning, and we are with him, whistling along.
The game has started, and he is in your place, taking charge.
